title: Wary allies show there's no quick fix to Trump's Iran crisis
summary_full: European leaders are hesitant to help Trump secure the Strait of Hormuz, but they know inaction on the Iran war is not really an option.
summary_public: European leaders are hesitant to help Trump secure the Strait of Hormuz, but they know inaction on the Iran war is not really an option.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: European leaders are hesitant to help Trump secure the Strait of Hormuz
